description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design, surrounded by a well-manicured hedge and lush landscaping. The exterior features a mix of light brown and beige wall panels, large windows, and a spacious driveway leading to a covered carport. The property includes a private backyard with a wooden deck, outdoor seating, and several mature trees providing shade and privacy. The front yard is neatly organized with a paved path, a small lawn, and ornamental shrubs. The house is set back from a wide street, with a secure gate and a hedge fence enclosing the property. The overall aesthetic is clean, contemporary, and designed for comfortable urban living.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard enclosed by a hedge. Features include a carport, wooden deck, and a mix of greenery and paved areas.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the side, highlighting the carport, driveway, and dense landscaping along the property edge.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front of the house, with the main gate, driveway, and a clear view of the entryway and hedge fence.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the house, featuring the backyard, wooden deck, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the opposite side, focusing on the carport, side yard, and additional greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door, paved path, and is set behind a hedge and gate, with no porch or decorative columns.
